\tzpentry{ID3888}{Kaluza-Klein Partition Function Bound}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3888 introduces Kaluza-Klein Partition Function Bound as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} |l - l'| &\leq 2, \quad l + l' + 2 \in 2\mathbb{Z} \\ m + m' + m_{KK} &= 0 \pmod{2\pi R_{KK}/\lambda_{\text{dB}}} \end{align}
